Please make all checks payable to THE PALLADIUM CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION, INC. Kindly coordinate with the undersigned for any queries within 3 days upon receipt of invoice, otherwise billing is deemed correct. Please submit simultaneously with your payment the corresponding Creditable Tax Witheld at Source (2307) and validated deposit slip or transfer slip for payment  deposited directly for Official Receipt issuance. Failure to settle on or before end of the month will be charged a 2% interest on association dues and 2% for utilities based on principal.  Please email us at billing.palladium@asia-affinity.com or contact us at 0917 170 7677 for any query about your bill.
THIS BILLING INVOICE SHALL BE VALID FIVE (5) YEARS FROM THE DATE OF ATP.

OSCA/SC/Other ID No:          SC/Signature:  
 
PAYMENT REMINDERS
1. Make sure that the account number you provide is correct.
2. Please pay on or before your due date to avoid penalty and any inconvenience
which may be caused by the disconnection of your electric service. A
Disconnection Notice will be issued for failure to settle current bill after due date.
3. Payment can be made on, before, or after due date at MORE Office or thru any of
the accredited banks, payment centers, or via GCash and DragonPay. (See
MORE website for list of accredited third-party collecting agents)
4. Always ask for an official receipt or validated receipt.
5. A two percent (2%) surcharge on the UNPAID AMOUNT of the bill shall be
charged to the customer on the next billing cycle.
6. If you received a Disconnection Notice (separate notice or embedded in your bill),
please pay within 48-hours to avoid disconnection.
7. For payments received after disconnection of service, a Twenty Pesos (Php
20.00) reconnection fee, exclusive of the value-added tax, shall be charged on
the next billing cycle. 
  Disputes not settled by our Consumer Welfare Desk can be elevated to the ERC Consumer
  Affairs Service at (02) 687-55-77 or by email at consumer@erc.gov.ph
ANNOUNCEMENT: 
If electric service has been disconnected due to non-payment of bill, a BILL DEPOSIT will be collected
and/or adjusted based on your actual average monthly bill in the past 12 months or P2,500 whichever is
higher.
DISCONNECTION NOTICE
Please pay immediately your unpaid electric consumption in the sum indicated as overdue. If the amount remains
unpaid, we will be constrained to disconnect your electric service after 48 hours from receipt of this notice. Kindly
disregard this notice if you have already made prior payment arrangements. For other concerns and inquiries, you
may call our hotline at (033) 330-MORE (6673); message us in FB Messenger, MORE Power Iloilo; visit our website at
www.morepower.com.ph; or email us at customercare@morepower.ph.
